text: Lesson 103 The French test Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 第103课 法语测试 听录音,然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 第103課 法語測試 聽錄音,然後回答這個問題。

text: How long did the exam last?
How was the exam, Richard?
Not too bad.
I think I passed in English and Mathematics.
zh: 我觉得我英语和数学都及格了。
zh_hant: 我覺得我英語和數學都及格了。

text: The questions were very easy.
How about you, Gary?
The English and Maths papers weren't easy enough for me.
zh: 英语和数学卷对我来说不够简单。
zh_hant: 英語和數學卷對我來說不夠簡單。

text: I hope I haven't failed.
I think I failed the French paper.
I could answer sixteen of the questions.
They were very easy.
But I couldn't answer the rest.
They were too difficult for me.
French tests are awful, aren't they?
zh: 法语考试太可怕了,是吧?
zh_hant: 法語考試太可怕了,是吧?

text: I hate them.
I'm sure I've got a low mark.
Oh, cheer up!
Perhaps we didn't do too badly.
zh: 也许我们考得没那么差。
zh_hant: 也許我們考得沒那麼差。

text: The guy next to me wrote his name at the top of the paper.
zh: 坐我旁边的那个人在卷子最上面写了名字。
zh_hant: 坐我旁邊的那個人在卷子最上面寫了名字。

text: Yes?
Then he sat there and looked at it for three hours!
zh: 然后他就坐在那儿看了三个小时!
zh_hant: 然後他就坐在那兒看了三個小時!

text: He didn't write a word!
